document:
Pine Street Data Support Handbook

Support hours: Monday-Friday, 09:00-17:00 UTC.
Refund policy: Customers may request a refund within 14 days of purchase.
Invoice questions should go to billing@pinestreet.example.
Security incidents must be acknowledged within 8 hours.
Escalation changes must be documented in the operations runbook.
question: How many days long is the refund period?
